about.title: About NexaSphere
about.subtitle: Building Tomorrow's Tech Leaders Today
about.institutions_label: GL Bajaj Group of Institutions · Mathura
about.desc_1: NexaSphere is a student-driven tech ecosystem at GL Bajaj Group of Institutions, Mathura. Founded to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world technology, we run hackathons, workshops, knowledge-sharing sessions, and career guidance events.
about.desc_2: From peer-led Knowledge Sharing Sessions and hands-on workshops to Industry Insider career guidance and competitive hackathons — NexaSphere runs events that connect curiosity with real opportunity, all year round.
about.desc_3: We've hosted KSS #153 on the Impact of AI, are running an Industry Insider career guidance session on March 13, and a Git & GitHub workshop is coming soon. NexaSphere is where curiosity meets real opportunity.

values_list.innovation_desc: Pushing boundaries and exploring what's possible.
values_list.collaboration_desc: Building together is always better than building alone.
values_list.learning_desc: Every session, event, and conversation is a lesson.
values_list.growth_desc: Personal and professional development at every step.
values_list.community_desc: A tight-knit circle of people who lift each other up.
values_list.technology_desc: Technology is our language and our playground.

journey_list.founded_desc: NexaSphere was architected and formed at GL Bajaj Group of Institutions, Mathura.
journey_list.kss_153_desc: Inaugural Knowledge Sharing Session on Impact of AI — 3 presenters, 5 volunteers, full house.
journey_list.expanding_desc: Hackathons, workshops, open-source days and more — all in the pipeline.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.subtitle_home: Click any activity to explore sessions & events
activities.subtitle_page: Every format is designed to sharpen a different skill. Explore what excites you — then dive in.
activities.events_coming_soon: Events coming soon. Watch this space!

Hackathon.title: Hackathon
Hackathon.description: Intense coding marathons where teams race against the clock to build innovative solutions to real-world problems. Collaborate, iterate fast, and ship something that matters — all within 24–48 hours.
Hackathon.longDesc: Intense 24–48 hour coding marathons where teams build innovative solutions to real-world problems under time pressure. Participants form cross-functional teams, brainstorm ideas, design architectures, and ship working prototypes — all under the clock.

Codathon.title: Codathon
Codathon.description: Competitive programming challenges that test your algorithmic thinking, problem-solving speed, and code efficiency. Ranked rounds, timed battles, and a leaderboard that keeps the pressure on.
Codathon.longDesc: Competitive programming contests that test your algorithmic thinking, data structures knowledge, and code efficiency. From greedy to dynamic programming — sharpen your edge for placements and ICPC-style rounds.

Ideathon.title: Ideathon
Ideathon.description: Idea generation competitions where creativity and strategic thinking take center stage over code. Pitch bold solutions, validate your concept, and let the best idea win — no coding required.
Ideathon.longDesc: Creativity-first competition where the best idea wins — no code required. Pitch your innovation, back it with research, and present a compelling case. Perfect for thinkers, designers, and business-minded builders.

features.1: Pitch to a panel of judges

Promptathon.title: Promptathon
Promptathon.description: The art of talking to AI turned into a competitive sport. Craft the sharpest, most creative prompts to solve real-world problems, generate stunning outputs, and outsmart your peers in the age of generative intelligence.
Promptathon.longDesc: The art of talking to AI turned into a competitive sport. Craft the sharpest, most creative prompts to solve real-world problems, generate stunning outputs, and outsmart your peers in the age of generative intelligence.

Workshop.title: Workshop
Workshop.description: Hands-on learning sessions on cutting-edge tools, frameworks, and emerging technologies. Led by experienced peers, alumni, or industry guests — every workshop gets you building something real by the end.
Workshop.longDesc: Hands-on learning sessions on cutting-edge tools, frameworks, and emerging technologies. Led by experienced peers, alumni, or industry guests — every workshop gets you building something real by the end.

Insight Session.title: Insight Session
Insight Session.description: Deep-dive talks and panel discussions exploring industry trends, career paths, and the future of technology. Hear from people who are building it — and leave with clarity on where you want to go.
Insight Session.longDesc: Deep-dive talks and peer-to-peer knowledge sharing where every member is both teacher and student. Explore industry trends, career paths, emerging research, and the big ideas shaping tomorrow’s technology landscape.

Open Source Day.title: Open Source Day
Open Source Day.description: Dedicated events encouraging real contributions to open-source projects. Learn Git workflows, find your first issue, submit PRs, and become part of the global developer community — all in a guided, supportive environment.
Open Source Day.longDesc: Dedicated events encouraging real contributions to open-source projects. Learn Git workflows, find your first issue, submit PRs, and become part of the global developer community — all in a guided, supportive environment.

Tech Debate.title: Tech Debate
Tech Debate.description: Structured debates on controversial tech topics — AI vs human creativity, tabs vs spaces, Web3 hype, and more. Sharpen your critical thinking, defend your stance, and become a confident communicator.
Tech Debate.longDesc: Structured debates on the most controversial topics in tech — AI vs Human Jobs, Native vs Cross-Platform, SQL vs NoSQL. Sharpen your ability to defend a position, handle rebuttals, and communicate technical ideas clearly.

team.join_desc: We're looking for passionate students to drive NexaSphere forward. Fill in the form and we'll reach out!

contact.hero_subtitle: We're a student-run community — always happy to connect, collaborate, and answer questions.

membership.title: Join NexaSphere Community
membership.label: Membership Form
membership.subtitle: NexaSphere connects students with opportunities across Tech and Non-Tech domains — development, cloud, cybersecurity, management, and career growth.
membership.complete_desc: Thank you for joining NexaSphere — GL Bajaj Group of Institutions 🚀
membership.important_desc: This form can be filled only once per device. Please read all questions carefully and verify your details before submitting. Once submitted, you will not be able to edit your response.
membership.ecosystem_desc: NexaSphere is the official student tech ecosystem at GL Bajaj Group of Institutions, Mathura. We bring together students from all branches and years under one platform — organising and supporting tech and non-tech events across every domain:
membership.benefits_title: As a NexaSphere Member you get

benefits.0: Access to exclusive WhatsApp domain groups for learning & collaboration
benefits.1: Early access to workshops, hackathons, and events
benefits.2: Network with peers and Core Team across all domains
benefits.3: Certificates for events you participate in
benefits.4: Career, placement, and industry insights from our sessions

membership.linkedin_pre: Before filling the form, please follow our official LinkedIn page:

membership.why_join_question: Why do you want to join NexaSphere?
membership.why_join_placeholder: Share your motivation and what you hope to learn or contribute.

membership.success_title: Thank you for filling the NexaSphere Membership Form!
membership.success_desc: Your form has been successfully submitted. 🎉 Now request to join the NexaSphere WhatsApp group using the link below — and mention that you have already filled the NexaSphere form. Our team will verify your responses and add you to the respective NexaSphere spaces/groups.
membership.linkedin_updates: 📌 Also make sure to follow the official NexaSphere LinkedIn page for updates. Stay connected and keep building 🚀 — NexaSphere Team
